items.user_turn: I need a finalized intake form and a pilot rollout package: use the usability-test feedback to produce a redlined form, concise consent/privacy wording that reflects what testing captured, staff facilitation notes, and a two-week pilot schedule with a budget and success metrics for internal approval. The pilot budget is $2,500 from the Discretionary Program Fund, and the compliance reviewer to approve consent and data-handling text is Maria Gonzalez at maria.gonzalez@legalclinic.org, (555) 987-6543—please incorporate that reviewer in the checklist.
